race.comment: HIT SQUAD (3) goes on top. He made his local debut at Kilmore over this trip and was kept very safe in betting, sticking on well enough for fourth. Expect sharp improvement off that, he should go close. DUNTULM LASS (7) struggled last time in town but had been coming along well prior with a couple of close up efforts at Sale. She should take holding out. JEZEBEL JENNI (8) has been good in two runs back and looks ideally suited rising to a mile third up. She draws ideally and has strong claims. CRYSTAL JADE (1) has been good in two runs to date and looks open to further improvement, look for him late in the piece from a wide draw.
